geometry_materials.note: Open-source proxy. Hand-transcribed from the registered NEA/OECD ICSBEP Handbook by the OpenMC developers (MIT-CRPG). Re-verify against the registered handbook before publishing any validation report.

data_provenance.canonical_source: NEA/OECD ICSBEP Handbook — registration required at https://www.oecd-nea.org/science/wpncs/icsbep/order.html. Open-source proxies are industry-standard derivatives but not the canonical specifications.

recommended_settings._doc: Intermediate-spectrum metal: a few more inactive cycles than fast-metal.
